<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation / metadata
- [ ] Refactor / tooling
- [ ] Performance

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (typecheck, lint, format, Vite build)
- [ ] `npm run test:rust` passes (if Rust changed)
- [ ] `npm run clippy` passes (if Rust changed)
- [ ] User-visible strings use `src/i18n/strings.ts` (if UI copy changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under **[Unreleased]** when behaviour or UX changes (maintainer style: see existing entries)
